doc_title: EDPB Guidance Note 04/2026 on Pseudonymized Health Data Processed by Non-Holders of the Linkage Key
label: fabricated
reason: The document is dated March 2026 (future date), references unverifiable 2024 case law, and asserts an implausible legal position that pseudonymized data falls outside GDPR scope for processors without the key.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: The document is dated March 2026 (a future date beyond my knowledge cutoff), cites a 2024 CJEU judgment I cannot verify, and contains an implausibly broad legal position contradicting established GDPR interpretation on pseudonymized data.
